channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Forget about nuclear reactors, Google may have found a sneaky way to get all the electricity it needs for its data centers by buying a little bit of power from thousands of US households
item.description: Google partners with Voltus to aggregate household energy devices into a virtual power plant supporting data center electricity demand growth

item.title: The Trump administration is reportedly in talks about taking a stake in OpenAI
item.description: Details for a potential deal haven't been finalized yet.

item.title: ‘We crossed that about 3 months ago': A16z's Marc Andreessen drops huge bombshell about AGI on Joe Rogan's podcast
item.description: Marc Andreessen says the latest frontier models have realized AGI – tech leaders believe the boundaries are shifting.

item.title: Hand-drawn interactive searching game Hidden Folks 2 is coming next year
item.description: It'll be available for PC and mobile, and maybe Nintendo Switch down the line.

item.title: I’m playing Divinity: Original Sin 2 at last — I can’t get enough of its terrain-based tactical battles
item.description: Divinity: Original Sin II's unsparing tactical combat and flexible build creation has got me salivating over its upcoming sequel.

item.title: How to watch Brazil vs Egypt: Free Streams & TV Guide for World Cup warm-up
item.description: All the ways to watch Brazil vs Egypt live streams online and from anywhere in one of the last friendlies before the 2026 World Cup gets underway.

item.title: Trump's latest memo puts 'most advanced AI in the world' into the military's hands
item.description: The memo also prevents companies from altering AI models being used by the military without prior approval.

item.title: What to expect from WWDC 2026: Siri’s highly anticipated revamp and Apple Intelligence updates
item.description: Apple's WWDC nears: Here's what you can look forward to.
